name: ExtensionTestPlan_Title
title: R5: Name for this test plan (human friendly) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TestPlan.title` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TestPlan.title` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `TestPlan.title` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TestPlan.title` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `TestPlan` is not mapped.
Element `TestPlan.title` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Name for this test plan (human friendly) (new)
element.comment:
Element `TestPlan.title` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `TestPlan` is not mapped.

This name does not need to be machine-processing friendly and may contain punctuation, white-space, etc.

element.short: Name for this test plan (human friendly)
element.definition: A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the test plan.
